title: Figma in Design System
content: # Figma Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Biweekly Digest Created by Accessibility Color System Component lifecycle Component overview Component status Data visualization Elevation Icons Illustrations International Design Layout Motion Patterns Repository Responsive Spacing States Storybook Styles Theming Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Keep up with the latest in Design Systems Subscribe Figma is a primary tool for designers to establish and maintain a robust Design System. It offers a centralized platform for creating and managing a comprehensive library of design components. With Figma, teams can streamline their workflow, ensure consistency, and improve efficiency. The tool allows for the creation and reuse of UI elements, making it easy to maintain a cohesive design language. Its collaborative features enable real-time collaboration and feedback, fostering a unified vision among design teams.
